name: welcome
description: A Red DiscordBot cog for customizable welcome messages with placeholders, JSON embeds, cached images, avatar overlays, and Red-Web-Dashboard integration.
author: Taako
install_msg: welcome cog loaded. Use [p]welcome to configure join messages for this server, or Red-Web-Dashboard to manage them visually.
short: Custom welcome messages with placeholders, embeds, cached images, avatar overlays, and dashboard support.
